name: Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3 oz fat-free cheese, grated or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and mushrooms in vinegar and water until soft and the liquid has mostly cooked away.
2. Combine salt, pepper, and dried tarragon with egg replacers. Mix well.
3. Add the mixture of egg replacers to the sauteed onions and mushrooms.
4. Add grated or diced cheese to the eggs and stir until combined.
5. Scramble the eggs until set.
Obviously, a non-stick skillet is essential here. The tarragon complements the eggs nicely and adds a pleasant flavor. Many variations on this recipe are possible, but using the tarragon works particularly well.
